features: Big Happy Smiles All Around - Add more fun to any children's party with our party blowers 2 pack set. Our 40 piece party blowers for kids are a great way for the little ones to have a roaring good time without making too much of a noise. They also come in assorted colours for that added festive feel whether it is a birthday or Christmas celebration.

Fantastic Pack - Made out of premium quality materials, our festive party whistles blowers have plastic mouthpieces to prevents the party blowers from exposure to moisture. Not only will your party blower make it through the party. it will even outlast it.

100% Child Safe - As a children's party toy, and as parents ourselves, we made sure that our party blowouts are made from 100% non-toxic materials. This means that you need not worry about any harmful chemicals getting in contact with your precious little ones.

Fill Up Party Bags - Looking for party bag fillers? Then why not get something that everyone can use! They make great party bags fillers, and kids party bag fillers. Use them as part of a game, or simply as party fillers for kids party bags
Easy to Use - Our party blowers feature a simple design that makes them effortless for children to use, adding to the excitement of the celebration without any hassle.

The pack includes 40 party blowers, providing plenty for a fun and festive celebration. Are these party blowers safe for children to use? Yes, our party blowers have been certified to all UK laws and regulations What colours are available for these party blowers? The party blowers come in assorted colours with plastic in blue, orange, yellow, green, white, pink, red, and ribbons in green, silver, purple, blue, red, gold, pink. Can these party blowers be used as party bag fillers? Absolutely, these party blowers make excellent party bag fillers and can be used in games or simply as fun items for kids' party bags.
